news-korea-econ.title: Vance takes lead selling Trump’s Iran gamble as Rubio, Hegseth and Ratcliffe cede spotlight on fragile deal
news-korea-econ.description: VP JD Vance defends fragile Iran MOU in Switzerland as reports suggest internal administration split over whether Tehran can be trusted on nuclear deal.

news-global-econ.title: Want to age better? Researchers say 4-minute routine may help prevent dangerous falls
news-global-econ.description: A Penn State clinical trial finds just four minutes of daily strength exercise can improve mobility, balance, and leg strength in older adults.

news-global-econ.title: As Tex-Mex chains close nationwide, Korean barbecue booms across America
news-global-econ.description: The Korean barbecue market is projected to reach $13.2 billion by 2034, as K-pop culture and social media drive Gen Z and millennial dining trends nationwide.

news-global-econ.title: Trump gets major win against China in African rare earth minerals race
news-global-econ.description: Trump administration backs American mining company Virtus Minerals in the DRC to counter China's control of critical cobalt and copper supply chains.

news-global-econ.title: LIZ PEEK: The left says the American Dream is dead, but millions prove otherwise
news-global-econ.description: A Gallup poll finds only 46% of Americans believe in the American Dream, as Sen. Bernie Sanders and Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez say it's rigged.

news-global-econ.title: Getty Images surges 145% after announcing OpenAI deal
news-global-econ.description: The company’s shares have been hurt by the artificial intelligence “scare trade,” which has rippled through various corners of the market, from software and IT services firms to so-called “old economy” industries such as logistics

news-global-soc.title: Jackie Kennedy was unimpressed by Buckingham Palace until Queen Elizabeth's advice changed everything: author
news-global-soc.description: A new book, "The Kennedys & the Windsors," explores how Queen Elizabeth and Jackie Kennedy's relationship evolved from awkward first meeting to mutual respect after tragedy.
